Summary

Websites that stay clean, fast, and consistent — without constant redesigns

I help teams maintain and improve corporate websites through structured content updates, UX-first editing, and AI-assisted QA. I’m reliable in remote environments and prefer continuous improvement: fix what matters, document changes, and keep quality high.

Content Opspublishing, governance, audits
UX Claritystructure, navigation, readability
AI + QAfaster iteration with human review

Note: The case studies below are representative sample projects (no client-confidential details) created to clearly demonstrate my process and deliverables.

Core Skills

What I bring

  • CMS publishing: page creation, layout integrity, version control mindset.
  • UX writing: clearer labels, better IA, fewer user dead-ends.
  • Quality assurance: cross-device checks, broken links, content consistency.
  • AI workflows: prompt templates, style checks, rewrite drafts + human verification.
  • Remote collaboration: async updates, Notion/Trello-style tracking, clear handoffs.

Location: Barcelona (open to remote EU)

Languages: Georgian C1 • English B2 • Spanish B2 • Russian B1
